steps.title: Compare the spreads
steps.content: Standard deviation measures how far the data values tend to be from the mean. The histograms use the same horizontal scale, so the wider histogram has the larger standard deviation.

steps.title: Use the visual clustering
steps.content: Company A's values are clustered close to the middle. Company B's values are more spread out from the middle, so company B has the larger standard deviation. The answer is A.
